headline: Stocks Climb to New Records With Investors Piling Back Into Tech
summary: Investors are piling into tech stocks again.  As a fragile cease-fire holds in the Middle East and AI disruption fears fade, investors are finding a surprise safe harbor in everything from semiconductors to enterprise software.  On Thursday, the S&P 500 and Nasdaq composite climbed to fresh record highs, extending a weeklong rally after President Trump said Israel and Lebanon have reached a 10-day cease-fire agreement and that the U.S. might hold discussions with Iran this weekend.

raw.headline: Stocks Climb to New Records With Investors Piling Back Into Tech

As a fragile cease-fire holds in the Middle East and AI disruption fears fade, investors are finding a surprise safe harbor in everything from semiconductors to enterprise software.  On Thursday, the S&P 500 and Nasdaq composite climbed to fresh record highs, extending a weeklong rally after President Trump said Israel and Lebanon have reached a 10-day cease-fire agreement and that the U.S. might hold discussions with Iran this weekend.

headline: Nvidia Stock Is Having a Great April (Just Not for a Chip Maker)
summary: Life coaches and first-grade teachers say not to compare yourself to others. By those standards Nvidia is doing great. Before shares started to slip Thursday afternoon, the chip maker was poised to clock a 12-day winning streak, its longest on record (going back to 1999).

headline: Broadcom Stock Is on an 8-Day Winning Streak. What’s Driving It Higher.
summary: Broadcom’s  stellar April looked set to continue Thursday as the chip stock rode a resurgent semiconductor trade back toward a record high.  Shares rose 0.3% to $397.82 in afternoon trading, putting  Broadcom  on pace to extend its winning streak to eight days.  If they hold, those gains would mark the third best month since the company—then known as Avago—went public in 2009.

headline: Broadcom Meta Chip Alliance Deepens AI Ties And Concentration Risks
summary: Broadcom (NasdaqGS:AVGO) and Meta Platforms have entered a multiyear, multigeneration partnership to expand their collaboration on custom AI chips and networking technology. The agreement is intended to support Meta's next wave of AI infrastructure and large scale compute capacity through at least 2029. Broadcom CEO Hock Tan is stepping down from Meta's board to focus on advising Meta on silicon strategy as part of this expanded relationship. For you as an investor, this development...
